changes: Living Shadow: Simulacrum duration has been increased from 20 to 22 seconds.
Bloodfest: Now increases maximum Cartridges to 6 in addition to adding 3 charges to your Powder Gauge.
Bloodfest: Recast time has been reduced from 120 to 60 seconds.
Bloodfest: Maximum capacity of the Powder Gauge while under the effect of Bloodfest has been increased to 4.
Bloodfest: Upon learning the trait Cartridge Charge II, Bloodfest will increase the maximum number of cartridges to 6.
Gnashing Fang: Potency has been reduced from 380 to 330.
Gnashing Fang: Potency upon learning the trait Melee Mastery II has been changed from 500 to 440.
Gnashing Fang: Now a charged action with a maximum of 2 charges.
Savage Claw: Potency has been reduced from 460 to 410.
Savage Claw: Potency upon learning the trait Melee Mastery II has been changed from 560 to 500.
Wicked Talon: Potency has been reduced from 540 to 490.
Wicked Talon: Potency upon learning the trait Melee Mastery II has been changed from 620 to 560.
Jugular Rip: Potency has been reduced from 200 to 180.
Jugular Rip: Potency upon learning the trait Melee Mastery II has been changed from 240 to 220.
Abdomen Tear: Potency has been reduced from 240 to 220.
Abdomen Tear: Potency upon learning the trait Melee Mastery II has been changed from 280 to 260.
Eye Gouge: Potency has been reduced from 280 to 260.
Eye Gouge: Potency upon learning the trait Melee Mastery II has been changed from 320 to 300.
Burst Strike: Potency has been reduced from 380 to 340.
Burst Strike: Potency upon learning the trait Melee Mastery II has been changed from 460 to 420.
Hypervelocity: Potency has been reduced from 160 to 140.
Hypervelocity: Potency upon learning the trait Melee Mastery II has been changed from 200 to 180.
Sonic Break: Potency has been increased from 300 to 340.
Sonic Break: Damage over time potency has been increased from 60 to 120.
Sonic Break: Damage over time duration has been reduced from 30 to 15 seconds.
Double Down: Potency has been reduced from 1,200 to 1,000.
Double Down: Cartridge cost has been increased from 1 to 2.
Reign of Beasts: Potency has been reduced from 1,000 to 800.
Noble Blood: Potency has been reduced from 1,100 to 900.
Lion Heart: Potency has been reduced from 1,200 to 1,000.
Goka Mekkyaku: Potency has been increased from 600 to 850.
Steel Maw: Potency has been increased from 100 to 120.
Steel Maw: Honed Reavers potency has been increased from 120 to 140.
Reaving Maw: Potency has been increased from 100 to 120.
Reaving Maw: Honed Reavers potency has been increased from 120 to 140.
Hunter's Bite: Potency has been increased from 130 to 180.
Swiftskin's Bite: Potency has been increased from 130 to 180.
Jagged Maw: Potency has been increased from 140 to 180.
Jagged Maw: Grimhunter's Venom effect potency has been increased from 160 to 220.
Bloodied Maw: Potency has been increased from 140 to 180.
Bloodied Maw: Grimhunter's Venom potency has been increased from 160 to 220.
Last Lash: Potency has been increased from 100 to 120.
Vicepit: Potency has been increased from 220 to 250.
Hunter's Den: Potency has been increased from 280 to 300.
Swiftskin's Den: Potency has been increased from 280 to 300.
Uncoiled Fury: Reduction in potency after the first target has been changed from 60% to 75%.
Reawaken: Reduction in potency after the first target has been changed from 65% to 80%.
First Generation: Reduction in potency after the first target has been changed from 65% to 80%.
Second Generation: Reduction in potency after the first target has been changed from 65% to 80%.
Third Generation: Reduction in potency after the first target has been changed from 65% to 80%.
Fourth Generation: Reduction in potency after the first target has been changed from 65% to 80%.
Uncoiled Twinfang: Reduction in potency after the first target has been changed from 60% to 75%.
Uncoiled Twinblood: Reduction in potency after the first target has been changed from 60% to 75%.
Ouroboros: Reduction in potency after the first target has been changed from 65% to 80%.
First Legacy: Reduction in potency after the first target has been changed from 65% to 80%.
Second Legacy: Reduction in potency after the first target has been changed from 65% to 80%.
Third Legacy: Reduction in potency after the first target has been changed from 65% to 80%.
Fourth Legacy: Reduction in potency after the first target has been changed from 65% to 80%.
Apex Arrow: Potency has been increased from 120-600 to 140-700.
Blast Arrow: Potency upon learning the trait Ranged Mastery has been changed from 600 to 700.
Radiant Encore: Potency when 1 Coda is active has been increased from 600 to 700.
Radiant Encore: Potency when 2 Coda are active has been increased from 700 to 800.
Radiant Encore: Potency when 3 Coda are active has been increased from 1,000 to 1,100.
Drill: Potency upon learning the trait Marksman's Mastery II has been changed from 620 to 660.
Air Anchor: Potency upon learning the trait Marksman's Mastery II has been changed from 620 to 660.
Chain Saw: Potency upon learning the trait Marksman's Mastery II has been changed from 620 to 660.
Excavator: Potency has been increased from 620 to 660.
Saber Dance: Potency upon learning the trait Dynamic Dancer has been changed from 520 to 540.
Fan Dance IV: Potency upon learning the trait Dynamic Dancer has been changed from 420 to 460.
Last Dance: Potency has been increased from 520 to 540.
Embolden: Increase to own magic damage changed from 5% to 10%.
Manafication: In accordance with the removal of Enhanced Manafication, recast time has been reduced from 120 to 110 seconds.
Manafication: Now temporarily increases the ranges of Enchanted Riposte, Enchanted Zwerchhau, and Enchanted Redoublement to 25 yalms.
Manafication: The additional effect 'Grants 6 stacks of Manafication' has been changed to 'Grants 3 stacks of Magicked Swordplay.' The duration remains at 30 seconds.
Manafication: The additional effect 'Grants Prefulgence Ready upon consuming 6 stacks of Manafication' has been changed to 'Grants Prefulgence Ready.' The duration remains at 30 seconds.
Vice of Thorns: Potency has been increased from 900 to 950.
Prefulgence: Action change settings can now be enabled to switch Prefulgence with Manafication.
Enhanced Manafication: This trait has been removed.
Enhanced Manafication II: This trait has been removed.
Enhanced Manafication III: In conjunction with the removal of Enhanced Manafication and Enhanced Manafication II, Enhanced Manafication III will be renamed Enhanced Manafication.
Glare III: Potency upon learning the trait White Magic Mastery has been changed from 340 to 350.
Afflatus Misery: Potency upon learning the trait White Magic Mastery has been changed from 1,360 to 1,400.

Plenary Indulgence: The effect 'Grants Confession to nearby party members' has been changed to 'Grants Confession to nearby party members, reducing damage taken by 10%.' The duration remains at 10 seconds.
White Mage: Full stacks of Lilies and the Blood Lily in full bloom will be granted to white mage upon the beginning of duties.
Biolysis: Potency upon learning the trait Tactician's Mastery has been changed from 80 to 85.
Collective Unconscious: Damage reduction effect duration has been increased from 5 to 10 seconds.

Collective Unconscious: The effect 'Effects will be applied continuously to self and all party members standing within the celestial ring' has been changed to 'Wheel of Fortune will be applied continuously to self and all party members standing within the celestial ring.'
Eukrasian Dosis III: Potency upon learning the trait Magick Mastery has been changed from 80 to 85.
Haelan: MP cost has been reduced from 2,500 to 2,000.
Shield Smite: When targeting a player under the effect of Guard, the effect that increases damage taken will not be applied. Instead, the strength of Guard will be halved.
Plunge: Potency of the Biolytic effect reducing a target's HP recovered by healing actions has been reduced from 20% to 15%.
Sole Survivor: HP and MP restored when targets under the effect of Sole Survivor are KO'd has been reduced from 20% to 15%.
Salted Earth: Healing over time potency has been reduced from 6,000 to 5,000. Damage over time potency has been reduced from 6,000 to 5,000.
Relentless Rush: Potency has been increased from 4,000 to 4,500.
Geirskogul: Potency has been increased from 4,000 to 5,000.
Nastrond: Potency has been increased from 4,000~8,000 to 5,000~10,000.
Hyosho Ranryu: Potency has been increased from 16,000 to 18,000.
Goka Mekkyaku: Potency has been increased from 4,000 to 5,000. Damage over time potency has been increased from 4,000 to 5,000.
Ogi Namikiri: Potency of the barrier created when attacking two or more targets has been increased from 9,000 to 10,000.
Kaeshi: Namikiri: Potency of the barrier created when attacking two or more targets has been increased from 9,000 to 10,000.
World-swallower: Potency has been increased from 12,000 to 15,000.
Honing Dance: Potency has been increased from 4,000 to 4,500.
Clawed Muse: Potency of the effect reducing a target's HP recovered by healing actions has been reduced from 20% to 15%.
Tempera Grassa: Effects of the action now extend through obstructions on the field.
Star Prism: Effects of the action now extend through obstructions on the field.
Aquaveil: Recast time has been reduced from 20 to 18 seconds.
Seraph Strike: Potency of the Protect effect reducing damage taken has been increased from 8% to 10%.
Biolysis: Potency of the Biolytic effect reducing a target's HP recovered by healing actions has been reduced from 20% to 15%.
Chain Stratagem: When targeting a player under the effect of Guard, the effect that increases damage taken will not be applied. Instead, the strength of Guard will be halved.
Accession: Effects of the action now extend through obstructions on the field.

new_content.name: Worqor Chirteh (Triumph)
new_content.description: A new campaign addition to Frontline.

new_content.name: Feral Fandom
new_content.description: Chronicles of a New Era quest.

new_content.name: Unfamiliar Territory
new_content.description: Quest to unlock phantom village teleport.

new_content.name: Every Little Thing She Does Is Mahjong
new_content.description: Sidequest required to unlock Doman Mahjong character voices.

new_content.name: Strategy Boards
new_content.description: A new feature designed to help coordinate with party members and overcome challenging duties.

new_content.name: Command Panel
new_content.description: A new interface that allows you to register various actions and commands.

housing.name: Tea Flower Seeds
housing.description: Seeds for flowerpots that can be purchased from various housing material suppliers.

housing.name: Forged Leaves Ceiling Light
housing.description: An ornate light fixture featuring intricately wrought metal foliage.

housing.name: Imitation Battlefield
housing.description: Outdoor Furnishing: Rusted weapons and torn banners stud a patch of scorched earth in this lifelike replica of a grim battlefield.

housing.name: Frosted Topiary
housing.description: Outdoor Furnishing: A closely cropped shrub topped with a thick layer of snow.

housing.name: Mhachi Lamppost
housing.description: Outdoor Furnishing: This ornate, somewhat somber lamppost appears to be of ancient Mhachi design.

housing.name: Frozen Garden Pond
housing.description: Outdoor Furnishing: The waters of this snow-dusted pond are frozen still as the depths of winter.

housing.name: Everkeep Mixing Booth
housing.description: Furnishing: A futuristic array of audio equipment bristling with buttons and dials.

housing.name: Tuliyollan Beverage Rack
housing.description: Furnishing: Stocked with a selection of libations served at popular Tuliyollan establishments.

housing.name: Tuliyollan Bench
housing.description: Furnishing: A robust bench designed in the Tuliyollan style.

housing.name: Tuliyollan Screen
housing.description: Furnishing: A painted wooden partition of Tuliyollan design.

housing.name: Tuliyollan Stool
housing.description: Furnishing: A sturdy round stool designed in the Tuliyollan style.

housing.name: Fortune-teller's Table
housing.description: Furnishing: A modest round table laden with all the fortune-telling accoutrements one could need.

housing.name: Lakeland Planter
housing.description: Furnishing: An ornate wooden barrel sporting a lilac-leaved tree reminiscent of Lakeland foliage.

housing.name: Eulmore Planter
housing.description: Furnishing: This gilded potted plant embodies Eulmore's unseemly decadence.

housing.name: Straight Tuliyollan Counter
housing.description: Table: A merchant's counter designed in the Tuliyollan style.

housing.name: Curved Tuliyollan Counter
housing.description: Table: A rounded counter designed in the Tuliyollan style.

housing.name: Tuliyollan Table
housing.description: Table: A cloth-covered table designed in the Tuliyollan style.

housing.name: Sampler Board
housing.description: Tabletop: A tasteful arrangement of appetizers.

housing.name: Adventurer's Effects
housing.description: Tabletop: Ideal for storing oddments accumulated over the course of countless adventures.

housing.name: Occult Compass
housing.description: Tabletop: A curious compass perhaps once used by an isle-bound recluse.

housing.name: Occult Pyramicula
housing.description: Tabletop: A perplexing pyramidal ornament of the like appreciated by mysterious recluses residing on distant isles.

housing.name: Tuliyollan Censer
housing.description: Tabletop: An ornate censer of Tuliyollan design.

housing.name: Steaming Stew Bowl
housing.description: Tabletop: Piping hot stew served in a rustic wooden bowl.

housing.name: Il Mheg Planter
housing.description: Tabletop: Features a slender tree snaking its way out of a miniature Lyhe Ghiah.

housing.name: Minishroom Lamp
housing.description: Tabletop: This organic light source features a cluster of faintly glowing mushrooms.

housing.name: Doom-engine Levinbox
housing.description: Tabletop: Modeled after the motive apparatus of a monstrous locomotive.

housing.name: Unfriendly Yan Neon Wall Light
housing.description: Wall-mounted: A vivid wall light designed in the likeness of an otherworldly sheep spirit.

housing.name: Peeling Wallpaper Sticker
housing.description: Wall-mounted: Give your abode an air of studied neglect.

housing.name: Tuliyollan Rug
housing.description: Rug: A rectangular rug woven in the Tuliyollan fashion.
